children.heading: Definition of eligible entity
children.label: a Definition of eligible entity
children.text: In this section, the term “eligible entity” means an emergency feeding organization.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall use funds made available under subsection (d) to make grants to eligible entities to pay the costs of an activity described in subsection (c).

children.label: A
children.text: expanding the capacity and infrastructure of food banks, State-wide food bank associations, and food bank collaboratives that operate in rural areas; and

children.label: B
children.text: improving the capacity of the food banks to procure, receive, store, distribute, track, and deliver time-sensitive or perishable food products.
the development and maintenance of a computerized system for the tracking of time-sensitive food products;
capital, infrastructure, and operating costs associated with the collection, storage, distribution, and transportation of time-sensitive and perishable food products;

improving the security and diversity of the emergency food distribution and recovery systems of the United States through the support of small or mid-size farms and ranches, fisheries, and aquaculture, and donations from local food producers and manufacturers to persons in need;
providing recovered foods to food banks and similar nonprofit emergency food providers to reduce hunger in the United States;

children.label: B
children.text: potential nonprofit emergency food providers; and

children.label: C
children.text: persons in need of emergency food assistance in rural areas; and
constructing, expanding, or repairing a facility or equipment to support hunger relief agencies in the community.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this section $15,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2008 through 2023.
